raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.2":"The section concludes with an explicit SOTA assertion and a deployment recommendation; the logical validity of those inferences from the reported figures is directly at stake.","R1.3":"Every interpretive claim is anchored to specific numbers (96.4% acc, F1 0.962, AUROC 0.987, four per-attack breakdowns); verifying that prose characterisations match the stated results is central to any substantive reading of the section.","R1.4":"The text explicitly claims a new SOTA over RawNet2 on a novel evaluation setting; the adequacy of the single-baseline comparison and scope of the delta (+4.7 pp / +4.4 pp) require scrutiny if a technical critique is in scope.","R1.6":"'Help me with this section' is the prototypical trigger for prose-level editing; sentence clarity, paragraph transitions, and register are highly plausible primary targets."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Are you asking primarily for writing-quality improvements (prose clarity, flow, sentence-level editing), or for a technical/logical critique (soundness of the SOTA claim, evidence-claim alignment, evaluation-protocol validity)?"}

rationale.R1.2: The section concludes with an explicit SOTA assertion and a deployment recommendation; the logical validity of those inferences from the reported figures is directly at stake.
rationale.R1.3: Every interpretive claim is anchored to specific numbers (96.4% acc, F1 0.962, AUROC 0.987, four per-attack breakdowns); verifying that prose characterisations match the stated results is central to any substantive reading of the section.
rationale.R1.4: The text explicitly claims a new SOTA over RawNet2 on a novel evaluation setting; the adequacy of the single-baseline comparison and scope of the delta (+4.7 pp / +4.4 pp) require scrutiny if a technical critique is in scope.
rationale.R1.6: 'Help me with this section' is the prototypical trigger for prose-level editing; sentence clarity, paragraph transitions, and register are highly plausible primary targets.

parsed.clarification_question: Are you asking primarily for writing-quality improvements (prose clarity, flow, sentence-level editing), or for a technical/logical critique (soundness of the SOTA claim, evidence-claim alignment, evaluation-protocol validity)?
